texto: I'm not asking you to walk in my shoes
autor: I'd never wish my afflictions on anyone. But could you walk beside me on secure ground and reach to hold my hand?
explicacao: Citação de I'd never wish my afflictions on anyone. But could you walk beside me on secure ground and reach to hold my hand? sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm not asking you to walk in my shoes” articula reflexao, richelle-e-goodrich, making-wishes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como making-wishes.
